sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 4:1

items.sefariaRef: Talmud Eser HaSefirot, Section VI, List of Answers on Topics 4:1
items.html: It is the self of the light of Nekudim because what appears in the beginning of the emanation is the self. (Inner Light, Item 10)
